title: Wild Land
description: Discover a richer Minecraft world filled with new animals, diverse wildlife, and vibrant natural environments — perfect for explorers and nature lovers alike.
body:
Bring the wilds of the real world into Minecraft!

This pack focuses on adding real-world animals and ecosystems to your adventures. Explore forests, oceans, rivers, and skies filled with life — from tiny insects to massive whales. Each mod works together to create a more immersive, nature-rich survival experience.

Perfect for explorers, builders, and survival players who want their world to feel more alive.

![Wild lands](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d14dd14de979071f891a124a7a681d83b2513454.png)

You can also give me some idea about the new content.

Please support me by downloading this modpack and also visit my collection [here](https://modrinth.com/collection/ftMUuaWJ)
